stories.name: fix-readme-cli-examples
stories.title: Fix all incorrect CLI examples in README.md
stories.description: Update README.md to fix: (1) positional prompt args to use --prompt flag (lines 67, 106, 109), (2) --output to --out (lines 67, 125). Verify all other examples are correct.
